78: // Del deletes the item with the given key from c.
79: func (c *Cache) Del(key string) {
80: 	c.lock.Lock()
81: 	delete(c.data, key)
82: 	c.lruCache.remove(key)
83: 	c.lock.Unlock()
84: 	c.timingWheel.RemoveTimer(key)
85: }
